/CAL:PRELIMINARY HEARING AND PEOPLE'S MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE/X:JUDGE DORFMAN, ADA LOUIE, DPD GEDDES, THE DEFENDANT, COURT REPORTER AND CLERK ARE ALL IN THE COURTROOM/X:MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE IS DENIED/WITEXCL:DEFENSE/WIT SWORN DA:LAWRENCE LANDRY/EXHMA:PEO'S #1 - CD LABELED 2007 #69121 - 2 FILES ADMITTED/EXHMA:PEO'S #2 - COLOR PHOTO MAN SITTING WITH LACERATION ON LOWERSHOULDER AND MID-BACK/EXHMA:PEO'S #3 - COLOR PHOTO MAN SITTING WITH LACERATION ON LEFT SHOULDER/HTA1:1 AND 2/CTORD:THE ALLEGATION ATTENDANT TO COUNT 1 HAS BEEN ESTABLISHED BY THE EVIDENCE/X:EXHIBITS MARKED AND ADMITTED INTO EVIDENCE, ARE ORDERED RETURNED TO THE OFFERING PARTY PENDING FURTHER ORDER OF COURT,/X:THE DEFENSE MOVES THE COURT TO REDUCE COUNTS 1 AND 2 TO MISDEMEANOR OFFENSES PURSUANT TO PC 17(B)/ARG&SUB/MO DENIED/X:THE COURT HEARS THE DEFENSE BAIL MOTION/ARG&SUB/MO GRTD/ACM/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'SDEPARTMENT,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE FOR PURPOSES OF HOME DETENTION AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSD/DEF:WILL BE CONFINED TO HER HOME 24 HOURS PER DAY, 7 DAYS PER WEEK  LOCATED AT 2600 AURELIUS WALKER DR, #230, IN SAN FRANCISCO, CA/CTORD:DEFENDANT SHALL BE RELEASED WITH COORDINATED PICK-UP/WEAP/WS/DEF:MUST CHECK-IN WITH ACM, BY TELEPHOONE, FIVE TIMES PER WEEK,/DEF:MUST PARTICIPATE IN VIRTUAL ANGER MANAGEMENT GROUPS, THROUGH ACM/DEF:MUST CONTACT COMMUNITY PROGRAMS PRIOR TO LEAVING HER HOME TO ATTEND COURT, MEDICALAPPOINTMENTS OR FOR ANY OTHER PURPOSE/X:DEFENDANT IS ADMONISHED THAT THE CRIMINAL PROTECTIVE ORDER CURRENTLY IN PLACE IN THIS MATTER REMAINS IN FULLFORCE AND EFFECT/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/CONTD: ARRAIGNMENT ON THE INFORMATION/DOP/
